name: Eggs a La Cathy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Place crescent rolls in a 13" x 9-inch pan and press up sides to form crust.
3. Sprinkle with ham, then cover with cheese slices.
4. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, onions, mustard, and basil until combined.
5. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the top of the rolls.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
